title: Dystopian Future World
scenario: Design a dystopian future world for a science fiction novel. The world should be richly detailed, with a clear vision for a totalitarian government and a bleak future. The output should be in the format of a world-building document, with multiple sections and subsections.
constraints: Must include at least 3 unique technologies
Must describe at least 2 different forms of social control

evaluationCriteria.description: How deeply and compellingly is the world described?
How accurately and creatively is the totalitarian government described?
How accurately and creatively are the forms of social control described?
